_note: SINGLE SOURCE OF TRUTH for OpenClaw crons. Regenerated from live 2026-06-20. Restore via scripts/restore-crons.py if openclaw cron list goes empty.

payload.message: Good morning\! Did you weigh yourself today? If yes, reply with: weight: X.X (e.g. weight: 91.5)

Weekly review for Akash. Do ALL sections, then send ONE Telegram message (max 650 words). Skip any section with nothing to report; never fabricate.

1. HEALTH: Query the Health & Meds Notion database. Summarize supplements running low, upcoming appointments, medication reminders, and health notes from the past week.

2. COMPETITORS: Run `python3 /root/.openclaw/workspace/research/research.py "Revolut Monzo Starling Bunq news this week"` (Tavily). For each competitor with news: bold name, what happened (2 sentences), why it matters (1 sentence). Save each to Notion Competitor Tracker (database_id: 9a7e80a037544a2f929b295c37fa43f8). Skip competitors with no news.

3. BRAIN BRIEF: Query Second Brain (data_source_id: f1ce4e0f-9e0d-43da-87f8-94dae2732962) for this week's entries. Synthesize: top decisions (max 3), ideas (max 3), one thing to carry forward.

4. WIKI HEALTH: Query Personal Wiki DB (data_source_id: 33d78008-9100-8197-9f0f-000b205edfe8). Report domains with fewer than 3 Career/Framework pages and pages not reviewed in 30+ days. Suggest 3 specific wiki pages to add/update, grounded in Akash's work at CheQ, Flipkart Pay, or Trade Republic.

5. JOB SEARCH: Note any LinkedIn activity or job-search progress from the week.

6. WEEKLY USAGE: Run `/root/lyra-usage-tracker.sh weekly` and add a one-line summary.

Morning digest for Akash. Do ALL steps in order, then send ONE clean Telegram message (max 750 words). Skip any empty section; never fabricate.

1. EMAIL: Run `himalaya envelope list -s 10 -f INBOX`. Summarize total unread, any recruiter emails (flag job title + company), anything urgent needing a reply today (max 4 lines). If himalaya auth fails, write exactly one line: "Email: unavailable - refresh Gmail app password" and continue.

2. NEWS: Run these direct commands:
   /root/lyra-ai/scripts/openclaw-research-query.sh "AI and tech news today"
   /root/lyra-ai/scripts/openclaw-research-query.sh "fintech product launches this week"
   /root/lyra-ai/scripts/openclaw-research-query.sh "European startup news this week"
   Pick 3-5 most interesting stories. For each: bold headline, 2-sentence summary, why it matters. Save each to Notion News Inbox (database_id: 8a900cb78c0c4be996347c5dfebec375).

3. HEALTH: Run `/root/lyra-ai/scripts/openclaw-daily-summary.sh` and parse the JSON. Report yesterday's nutrition totals and today_workout. If meal_count is 0, say "No meals logged yesterday".

4. DRAFTS DUE: Check the Notion Content Ideas database for drafts due today or this week. If any, list them in one line each; if none, skip this section.

5. WIKI CANDIDATES: Query Twitter Insights DB (data_source_id: 32d7800891008191b853d73aea132065) for wiki_candidate=true AND Status=Draft added in last 24h, and Second Brain DB (data_source_id: e4027aafd2ff49e1babf7487725e2ef4) for rows added in last 24h with wiki_candidate=true. List up to 3 as: one-line gist (<=120 chars) + URL. If none, skip.

6. FOOTER: Run `/root/lyra-usage-tracker.sh daily` and append one line: yesterday's usage + estimated cost (Hetzner EUR0.23 + MiniMax $0.33 + Anthropic estimate from calls).

Format the message with section headers: Email | News | Health | Drafts | Wiki | (footer line).
